settings.heading: Check compatibility with confidence
settings.copy: Check platform, device, and workflow compatibility before you buy or install.
settings.support_note: Use compatibility to confirm the product, platform, and display setup before moving into manuals, downloads, or support.

settings.heading: Check compatibility by platform, device, and workflow
settings.copy: Use the filters below to narrow the exact setup you are checking.
settings.source_note: Start with platform, then device, then workflow. Once the match is clear, open manuals, downloads, or support.

settings.heading: Open the next resource
settings.copy: Once compatibility is confirmed, open the guide, file, or support path you need.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Continue to drivers or utilities tied to supported products.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Continue to setup guides or documentation tied to supported products.

settings.title: Get help now
settings.copy: Start a support request when compatibility still depends on one specific product or deployment detail.

settings.heading: Need help with one last compatibility detail?
settings.copy: Contact support when one product, device, or display detail still needs confirmation.
